summary: Completed testing of two new features: Receipt attachment and Category filter. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI tests verified both features work correctly.

issues: Deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props - Use 'boxShadow' instead
React Native warning: Unexpected text node in <View> components

critical_code_review_comments: Console deprecation warnings should be addressed for better code quality but not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing order #1 for testing receipt upload/delete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features tested and verified: 1) Receipt attachment - 'Allega Scontrino' button captures photo (requires camera permission), 'Scontrino' button shows preview modal when receipt exists, trash icon deletes receipt. Backend endpoints PUT/DELETE /api/orders/{id}/receipt work correctly. 2) Category filter - Works on both Menu screen and Order modal. Filter chips (Tutte, Primi, Secondi, Contorni, Dolci, Bibite, Insalate) filter menu items by category. Categories come from /api/categories endpoint.

details.allega_scontrino_button: Visible in order modal when no receipt attached - shows camera icon
details.scontrino_preview_button: Visible when receipt is attached - shows document icon
details.receipt_preview_modal: Opens correctly showing the receipt image with close button
details.delete_receipt_button: Trash icon visible next to Scontrino button when receipt attached

details.menu_screen_filter: Category chips visible above menu items: Tutte, Primi, Secondi, Contorni, Dolci, Bibite, Insalate
details.filter_functionality: Clicking category filters menu items correctly (verified with Secondi filter)
details.order_modal_filter: Same category chips available in order modal when adding items
details.category_badges: Items show category badge when 'Tutte' filter is selected
